confirm.removeChat: Are you sure you want to remove this chat?

errors.loadDashboard: Failed to load dashboard data. Please try again.
errors.ruleAssist: Failed to update rule text with AI

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.emptyState: No bots yet. Open Bots to create your own or join a team with an access code.

releaseNotes.title: What's new
releaseNotes.subtitle: App update history. Only changes that matter for bots, rules, and moderation.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Coming soon.
docs.body: Product documentation will appear here. For now, use in-app tooltips and release notes.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Coming soon.
terms.body: Terms and conditions will be published here.

settingsLlm.title: LLM settings
settingsLlm.subtitle: Instance-wide model configuration for self-hosted deployments.

botCredits.title: Credits
botCredits.subtitle: Purchase moderation credits for this bot.

billing.paymentReturnSuccess: Payment submitted — balance updates after confirmation.
billing.paymentApplied: Credits have been added to your balance.
billing.paymentSyncFailed: Could not verify the payment. Try Refresh or contact support with your receipt.

errors.generic: Could not apply this promo code. Check the code and try again.
errors.notFound: This promo code was not found
errors.inactive: This promo code is not active
errors.alreadyRedeemed: You have already used this promo code
errors.notSaas: Promo codes are not available in this deployment

billing.envOverrideHint: Environment LLM variables override these settings.

settings.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current key

referral.shareTitle: Invite friends — earn credits on their first purchase
referral.noOwnedBots: Create a bot you own to claim referral credits.
referral.claimSuccess: {credits} credits added to the selected bot.

chart.noActivity: No activity in the last 7 days

bot.emptyState: You have no bots yet. Create your own moderation bot or join an existing team with an access code from the bot owner.

modal.title: Add bot
modal.tokenHint: Bot {'@'}username and display name are resolved automatically from the token.
modal.joinDescription: Enter the access code from the bot owner. You will join as a team member (manager).

editModal.title: Edit Chat
editModal.silentModeEnabled: Enabled: violations logged to DB only — no Telegram delete, ban, or warning messages
editModal.silentModeDisabled: Disabled: per-rule actions apply (delete, warn, ban as configured on each rule)

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.notModeratedHint: Messages saved but not moderated — usually zero credits

recentActivity.title: Recent Activity
recentActivity.empty: No recent activity. Send messages to the bot to see logs here.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Deleting the bot permanently removes chats, rules, team members, and moderation history. Disabling the bot (Disable) does not delete data.

messageTemplates.title: Moderation messages
messageTemplates.description: Per-bot Warning and Ban texts (Telegram HTML). If {'{'}user_mention{'}'} is missing from the template, a mention is appended automatically.

team.title: Team Access
team.accessCodeForOperators: Access code is available to bot operators.
team.ownerManagesTeam: Team management is available to the bot owner.

moderation.emptyRules: No rules yet. Add a custom rule or pick a preset template.

chatUsers.title: Chat users
chatUsers.description: Users with warnings or bans. Owner and manager can reset warnings, unban, or pardon (both).
chatUsers.empty: No users with warnings or bans.

templateLibrary.title: Rule templates
templateLibrary.description: Preset moderation rules. Each copy is independent for this chat.

ruleModal.ruleTextHint: This text is passed to the AI when checking messages. Describe what counts as a violation and what is allowed.
ruleModal.ruleTextPlaceholder:
Treat ads for products or services as a violation.
Not a violation: a personal recommendation with no link and no call to buy.
ruleModal.aiAssistHint: The AI will rewrite the description and rule text.
ruleModal.aiAssistHintCreate: Describe the rule you want; the AI will draft the description and rule text.
ruleModal.aiAssistInstructionPlaceholder: e.g. Add an exception: sharing a discount is OK when replying to a direct question
ruleModal.aiAssistInstructionPlaceholderCreate: e.g. Ban commercial ads and channel self-promotion

audit.empty: No decisions yet. Send messages to the bot to see audit entries here.

releaseNotes.empty: No published releases yet. After the first release, change descriptions will appear here.

login.subtitle: Sign in with Telegram to manage moderation bots.
login.getLinkFromBot: Get a link from the bot

prerequisites: Sign in to the platform with the same Telegram account that sends /activate.
You are an owner or manager of the bot on the platform.
The bot is a group admin with permission to delete messages and restrict members.
The bot is enabled — otherwise the webhook will not process /activate.
chatActivation.existingGroupHint: Open the group in Telegram and send /activate (or /activate{'@'}bot_username). The bot will reply with success or an error; the chat will appear here once connected.
chatActivation.newGroupHint: Telegram will open to add the bot to a group. If the bot is already in the target group — choose "Bot already in group".
chatActivation.popupBlockedMessage: The browser blocked the Telegram window. Allow pop-ups or choose "Bot already in group" and run /activate.
chatActivation.expiredMessage: Waiting time expired. If the bot is already in the group — run /activate there. Otherwise try again.

modal.title: Connect chat
modal.intro: Choose a scenario. Sign in with the same Telegram account that sends /activate.

htmlHelp.title: Telegram HTML format
htmlHelp.docsLink: Official Telegram Bot API documentation — HTML

format.title: Format
format.body: Warning and Ban messages are sent to Telegram with parse_mode HTML. Use only supported tags; nested tags are not required.

placeholders.title: Placeholders
placeholders.body: Substituted by the server: {'{'}user_mention{'}'}, {'{'}user_name{'}'}, {'{'}rule_name{'}'}, {'{'}warnings_current{'}'}, {'{'}warnings_max{'}'}, {'{'}warnings_left{'}'} (Warning only). Buttons above the field insert them at the cursor.

userMention.title: User mention
userMention.body: If {'{'}user_mention{'}'} is missing from the template, the bot appends a mention at the end in a separate paragraph.

lineBreaks.title: Line breaks
lineBreaks.body: A new line is a line break character (Enter in the field). For a blank line between blocks, press Enter twice.

escaping.title: Escaping
escaping.body: Characters <, > and & in plain text must be <, >, &. Do not escape placeholders or ready-made HTML tags.

length.title: Length
length.body: No more than 4096 characters per template (Telegram limit).
